infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: BodyPilot uses the camera when you choose to scan food, barcodes, receipts, or progress photos.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: BodyPilot reads Apple Health data such as steps, workouts, active energy, heart rate, and body weight to personalize fitness, nutrition, and recovery insights.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: BodyPilot can write workouts, body weight, and nutrition updates to Apple Health when you choose to sync them.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BodyPilot uses your location during cardio sessions to calculate distance, pace, and route data.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: BodyPilot uses the microphone only when you choose to speak food logs into Pilot Log.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BodyPilot uses your photo library only when you choose an existing meal, receipt, profile, or progress photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: BodyPilot saves exported reports and progress images only when you choose to share them.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: BodyPilot uses speech recognition only when you choose verbal food logging so it can transcribe meals for your review before saving.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow BodyPilot to use the microphone when you choose verbal food logging.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow BodyPilot to transcribe spoken food logs for review before saving.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: BodyPilot reads Apple Health data such as steps, workouts, active energy, heart rate, and body weight to personalize fitness, nutrition, and recovery insights.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: BodyPilot can write workouts, body weight, and nutrition updates to Apple Health when you choose to sync them.
